title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at SpiceJet Cargo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at SpiceJet Cargo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the SpiceJet Cargo family as a Distribution Manager in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About SpiceJet Cargo:
SpiceJet Cargo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SpiceJet Cargo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
